author: Latasha
content:
First, let me say that I really love your podcast (I found you on Google Podcasts, and I now proudly delegate to your pool). I am several months into crypto and with my little knowledge of the benefits of Blockchain technology, I became a Cardano believer. Your podcast is very informative and you are good at breaking things down in simple terms a newbie can understand, yet still have complex and interesting content that challenges me ?.

Anyway that is why I had to post here that I loved this episode. I like that Martina represents the demographic of crypto supporters that aren't Blockchain savvy. Her questions are blunt yet innocent... they were the same questions I would have asked, lol. It was funny how you may have been thrown off a bit by her questions and you are very patient with your answers. Great chemistry, it would be cool to hear her on the show again.

author: Martina
content: I'm so glad to hear you enjoyed this episode Latasha ?. It was fun putting Peter in the hot seat, he has a great way of simplifying things to us less tech/Blockchain savvy peeps. I'd love to make a reappearance on the show (if Peter can handle it haha), I actually learned a lot through this conversation!
